query:
SELECT capped.distinct_id, capped.version
                    FROM (
                        SELECT distinct_id, version, id
                        FROM posthog_persondistinctid
                        WHERE team_id = $1 AND person_id = $2
                        LIMIT 2500
                    ) capped
                    ORDER BY (capped.distinct_id ~ '^([a-z0-9]+-){4}[a-z0-9]+$'), capped.id
                    LIMIT $3
